name: goalplz
description: Turn rough requests into auditable Codex Goal mode objectives.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough requests into auditable Codex goals.
interface.longDescription: Goalplz converts rough, multi-step requests into clear Codex Goal mode objectives with outcome, verification surface, constraints, boundaries, iteration policy, and blocked stop conditions.
defaultPrompt: Use /goalplz to make this request goal-ready.
Turn this debugging task into an auditable goal.
Draft a Goal mode objective for this migration.
